name: default
description: Standard mechanistic reasoning harness. Pre-loop analysis followed by iterative step proposal with deterministic validation.
execution_note: Modules execute in listed order within each phase. pre_loop_modules runs once before the loop; loop_module runs each iteration before post_step_modules; post_step_modules runs after each accepted mechanism step. Array position (step field) is the authoritative execution sequence.

pre_loop_modules.label: Check Atom Balance
pre_loop_modules.description: RDKit counts atoms on each side of the reaction. Reports whether starting materials and products are stoichiometrically balanced, and lists any deficit or surplus atoms. Runs once at the start.

pre_loop_modules.label: Identify Functional Groups
pre_loop_modules.description: SMARTS pattern matching identifies reactive functional groups (alcohols, ketones, amines, etc.) and leaving groups across all starting materials and products. Runs once; output informs atom-mapping context.

pre_loop_modules.label: Recommend pH
pre_loop_modules.description: Rule-based pH suggestion. If the user supplies a pH it is returned as-is. Otherwise, uses Dimorphite-DL protonation profiles or a heuristic acid/base scoring of the molecules. Runs once; the recommended pH is passed to the Assess Reaction Conditions LLM call.

pre_loop_modules.label: Assess Reaction Conditions
pre_loop_modules.description: LLM call that receives starting materials, products, the pH recommendation, and optional functional group data. Returns environment (acidic/basic/neutral), representative pH, pH range, and either acid candidates (acidic) or base candidates (basic). Its full JSON output is forwarded as conditions_guidance to the Predict Missing Reagents step.

pre_loop_modules.label: Predict Missing Reagents
pre_loop_modules.description: LLM call that receives starting materials, products, and the full conditions_guidance JSON from the previous step (including representative pH and acid/base candidates). Returns any missing reactants or products needed to balance the reaction under the recommended conditions.

inputs: conditions_guidance (full JSON from Assess Reaction Conditions)

pre_loop_modules.label: Map Atoms Between Reactants/Products
pre_loop_modules.description: LLM call that receives starting materials and products. Returns a proposed atom-to-atom mapping, unmapped atoms, and confidence score. If functional group analysis is enabled, that context is included.

pre_loop_modules.label: Map To Reaction Type
pre_loop_modules.description: LLM call that maps the reaction to one mechanism taxonomy label from training_data/reaction_type_templates.json, with confidence and rationale. Includes explicit 'no_match' when no taxonomy type fits.

loop_module.label: Propose Mechanism Step
loop_module.description: Core LLM call executed each iteration of the mechanism loop. Proposes up to max_candidates ranked elementary step candidates from current_state. Each candidate is evaluated by post_step_modules; failed candidates trigger retry or backtracking.

outputs: candidates (ranked list of intermediate_smiles, resulting_state, reaction_smirks, electron_pushes, step_label)

post_step_modules.label: Check Bond/Electron Conservation
post_step_modules.description: Parses the DBE metadata tags from the reaction SMIRKS and verifies that bond-order and electron-count changes sum to zero. Part of the mechanism step validation; re-runs on each retry attempt. Ground truth in skills/mechanistic/bond_electron_validation/validator.py.

post_step_modules.label: Check Step Atom Balance
post_step_modules.description: RDKit verifies that every atom in the current state appears in the resulting state — no atoms created or destroyed. Part of the mechanism step validation; re-runs on each retry attempt. Ground truth in skills/mechanistic/atom_balance_validation/validator.py.

post_step_modules.label: Check State Changed
post_step_modules.description: Checks that the resulting state differs from the current state and that starting materials are not simply returned unchanged. Part of the mechanism step validation; re-runs on each retry attempt. Ground truth in skills/mechanistic/state_progress_validation/validator.py.

post_step_modules.label: Collect Validation Warnings
post_step_modules.description: Deterministic aggregation of validation warnings from the accepted mechanism step. Runs once per loop iteration after a step passes validation checks. Does not feed back into the current step — it records critique for observability.

post_step_modules.label: Map Atoms for Step
post_step_modules.description: LLM atom mapping for the accepted mechanism step. Maps atoms between current_state and resulting_state after each successful step.

sas.description: Single sequential proposer, top-1 candidate only.

centralized_mas.description: Current default. Orchestrator proposes multi-candidate, validates, selects.

independent_mas.description: N independent parallel calls; candidate pools concatenated; no peer sharing.

decentralized_mas.description: N agents x D debate rounds with peer summaries; consensus merge.

metadata.description: Default harness encoding the original hardcoded pipeline. Pre-loop: balance -> functional groups -> pH -> conditions -> missing reagents -> atom mapping -> reaction type. Loop: propose mechanism step. Post-step: validators -> reflection -> step mapping.

changelog.description: Initial default harness migrated from hardcoded pipeline in coordinator.py.
Migrated to schema_version 2.0: added explicit step ordering, loop_module section, validator_skill references, tool_calling_mode, and execution_note for human readability.
Schema 2.1: added topology_profiles for SAS / centralized MAS / independent MAS / decentralized MAS coordination strategies.
